title: TAG BINDINGS
body: Every component property can be bound to a tag. Click property → Add Binding → Tag → select path. Updates live as the tag value changes.
code:
Binding types:
  Tag         → direct tag reference
  Expression  → calculated from tags
  Property    → from another component
  Query       → from a Named Query

Tag binding:
  Property: value
  Type:     Tag
  Path:     [default]Plant/TK101/Level
  → component updates at scan rate

Bidirectional:
  Read-only by default.
  Input components can write back.
key: Bidirectional → user can write to PLC
All bindings are reactive — no polling
mistakes: Wrong binding type (Tag vs Expression vs Property)
Not understanding read vs write direction
